chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P. No.D-212 of 2016. I I Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 23'd November-2016. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri advocate for petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri Addl. Advocate General alongwith Mr Abid Hussain Qadri State Counsel. Through instant petition, petitioner seeks his appointment on deceased quota as his father, who was working as PST in Education Department, Govt. of Sindh, died during his service. Learned Addl.A.G submits that vide Notification bearing No.SO(C.IV)SGA&CO\4-17t16, dated 13th July, 2016, issued by the Govt. of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department, a Commitee has been constituted to scrutinize and decide the cases of appointments against deceased quota from BS-01 to BS-07 as per lawi rules/policy with the composition of 1. Chief Secretary, Sindh (Chairman), 2. Secretary, Law Department (Member), and 3. Secretary, concerned department (Member). He further submits that the said notification was subsequently modified by the Govt. of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department, vide Notification No.SO(C-lV) SGA&CD/4-17l16, dated 16th August, 2016, for the posts from BPS-01 to BPS-1 1 instead of posts from BPS-O1 to BPS-07, as per law/rules and recruitment policy. Learned Addl.A.G undertakes that the case of the petitioner for his appointment against deceased Crot" shall be considered by the Committee constituted vide Notification bearing No.SO(C.IV)SGA&CDl4-17t1q dated 13th July, 2016, issued by the Govt. of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department, as per law/rules/recruitment policy, within a period of two months provided that the petitioner files application for his appointment on deceased quota by addressing to Chief Secretary, Govt. of Sindh. ln view of statement of learned Additional Advocate General, Counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition may be disposed of directing the alleged Committee that, if the petitioner files application for his appointment against deceased quota, the same shall be considered by them within a period of two months from the date of application.

He further submits that the said notification was subsequently modified by the Govt. of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department, vide Notification No.SO(C-lV) SGA&CD/4-17l16, dated 16th August, 2016, for the posts from BPS-01 to BPS-1 1 instead of posts from BPS-O1 to BPS-07, as per law/rules and recruitment policy. Learned Addl.A.G undertakes that the case of the petitioner for his appointment against deceased Crot" shall be considered by the Committee constituted vide Notification bearing No.SO(C.IV)SGA&CDl4-17t1q dated 13th July, 2016, issued by the Govt. of Sindh, Services, General Administration & Coordination Department, as per law/rules/recruitment policy, within a period of two months provided that the petitioner files application for his appointment on deceased quota by addressing to Chief Secretary, Govt. of Sindh. ln view of statement of learned Additional Advocate General, Counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition may be disposed of directing the alleged Committee that, if the petitioner files application for his appointment against deceased quota, the same shall be considered by them within a period of two months from the date of application. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. 9t t, Office is directed to forward copy of this Order to the Chief Secretary, Govt. of Sindh, Secretary, Law Department Govt. of Sindh and Secretary, Education and Literacy Department, Govt. of Sindh, Karachi for information and compliance,2tc, JU GE J DG lrl I \ t ? t
